headline: Rural Clinic Coverage Falls Short With 1,200 Communities Underserved
context: MOH mapping shows 1,200 rural communities beyond 10km from the nearest government health clinic.

cards.big: 1,200 rural communities are more than 10km from nearest government health clinic
cards.sub: Affected populations rely on traditional remedies or forgo healthcare entirely

cards.big: Flying doctor service visits remote communities only once monthly serving 58 routes
cards.sub: Monthly visits cannot address acute or chronic conditions requiring regular care

cards.big: 72% of underserved communities are in Sabah Sarawak and Peninsular Orang Asli areas
cards.sub: Geographic marginalization overlaps with ethnic and economic disadvantage

cards.big: Brazil's Family Health Strategy placed 46,000 community health teams in underserved areas
cards.sub: Community-based model reaches 130 million Brazilians in remote regions

cards.big: Healthcare that requires a 10km journey through jungle is healthcare in name only
Should Malaysia establish permanent community health worker posts in all underserved areas
